tasks.label: gh-auth-status
tasks.command: env GH_PAGER=cat PAGER=cat GIT_PAGER=cat GH_FORCE_TTY=0 gh auth status -h github.com

tasks.label: gh-merge-open-prs
tasks.command: set -euo pipefail; prs=$(gh pr list -R tosolini/tradejournal --state open --json number -q '.[].number'); if [ -z "$prs" ]; then echo 'NESSUN_PR_APERTO'; exit 0; fi; for n in $prs; do echo "MERGE_PR_START #$n"; if gh pr merge -R tosolini/tradejournal "$n" --squash --delete-branch; then echo "MERGE_PR_OK #$n"; else echo "MERGE_PR_FAIL #$n"; fi; done; echo 'MERGE_BATCH_DONE'

tasks.label: gh-merge-open-prs-v2
tasks.command:
set -euo pipefail; list=$(gh pr list -R tosolini/tradejournal --state open --json number -q '.[].number'); if [ -z "$list" ]; then echo 'NESSUN_PR_APERTO'; exit 0; fi; printf '%s
' "$list" | while IFS= read -r n; do [ -z "$n" ] && continue; echo "MERGE_PR_START #$n"; if gh pr merge -R tosolini/tradejournal "$n" --squash --delete-branch; then echo "MERGE_PR_OK #$n"; else echo "MERGE_PR_FAIL #$n"; fi; done; echo 'MERGE_BATCH_DONE'

tasks.label: gh-list-open-prs-after-merge
tasks.command: gh pr list -R tosolini/tradejournal --state open --json number,title,mergeStateStatus,url -q '.[] | "#\(.number)\t\(.mergeStateStatus)\t\(.title)\t\(.url)"'

tasks.label: gh-list-open-prs-after-merge-v2
tasks.command: out=$(gh pr list -R tosolini/tradejournal --state open --json number,title,mergeStateStatus,url -q '.[] | "#\(.number)\t\(.mergeStateStatus)\t\(.title)\t\(.url)"'); if [ -z "$out" ]; then echo 'NESSUN_PR_APERTO'; else echo "$out"; fi

tasks.label: gh-list-open-prs-final
tasks.command: out=$(gh pr list -R tosolini/tradejournal --state open --json number -q '.[].number'); if [ -z "$out" ]; then echo 'NESSUN_PR_APERTO'; else echo "$out"; fi
